title: Order not delivered
description: I placed an order 7 days ago but it has not been delivered yet.

title: Received damaged product
description: The product arrived broken and unusable. I would like a replacement.

title: Wrong item received
description: I received a different item than what I ordered.

title: Refund not processed
description: I returned the product but haven't received my refund yet.

title: Unable to login
description: I cannot log into my account even after resetting my password.

title: Payment failed but charged
description: My payment shows failed but the amount was deducted from my bank account.

title: Coupon code not working
description: The discount coupon I received is not applying at checkout.

title: Delayed shipment update
description: Tracking information has not been updated for 3 days.

title: Account suspended
description: My account was suspended without any explanation.

title: Change delivery address
description: I need to change my delivery address after placing the order.

title: Product missing in package
description: One item from my order was missing in the delivered package.

title: Invoice download issue
description: I am unable to download the invoice from my order history.

title: Size exchange request
description: I would like to exchange the product for a different size.

title: App crashing during checkout
description: The mobile app crashes every time I try to complete my purchase.

title: Loyalty points not updated
description: My loyalty points were not added after completing my recent purchase.
